_meta.description: lesson_01 の語彙カード画像生成プロンプト（S列投入用）。master_prompt_design_guide_v2_9_1.py 準拠。v1.1 修正: CONSTRAINTS から 'inside the image' 限定句を除去し 'anywhere — including titles, labels, captions...' の絶対禁止表現に統一。テキストラベル（「教師」等）が生成される問題を修正。
_meta.change_from_v1_0: CONSTRAINTS 1行目を全語で修正: 'No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.' → 'No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions, or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.'

notes.skin_policy: diverse_unspecified: 肌色フレーズなし（v2.9.1継続）
notes.aspect_ratio: GAS経由のためプロンプト本文にアスペクト比指定なし（generateImages.gs が ASPECT_RATIO:1:1 を自動付与）
notes.visual_canon: 医者=聴診器のみ / 先生=マーカーor教科書 / 学生=バックパック / 会社員=スーツ+ブリーフケース
notes.flag_badge_exception: 国籍語彙の旗バッジ（形状・色）は CONSTRAINTS の例外として許可。文字は禁止。

_meta.change_from_v1_1: 国籍人物カード: 旗を『PRIMARY identifier・10-12%・正面に大きく』とする記述を全削除し、『主役は人物・旗は4%以下の小さなピン/ワッペン』へ是正（v2.4/v2.5方式に回帰）。建物カード: 日本語サイネージ描画指示を撤廃し、サイン板は空白・全スクリプト文字禁止を明示。健全な23語（役割人物・具体物・人/わたし）は無変更。

vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "医者" (doctor) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A doctor wearing a white coat (open at the front) over a simple shirt. A stethoscope hangs around the neck — THIS IS THE ONLY REQUIRED PROP. DO NOT add a clipboard, otoscope, pen, or any other medical tools. Professional and calm posture, slight forward lean of engaged readiness.
Pose and expression: Standing upright with a calm, professional expression. Arms relaxed at sides or one hand lightly touching the stethoscope.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the
subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees
to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view
simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "会社員" (company employee) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
An office worker in a neat business suit — navy or charcoal jacket with matching trousers and a white or light-colored shirt. A simple briefcase or laptop bag held at one side. Upright, confident, professional posture.
Pose and expression: Standing confidently, one hand holding a briefcase at the side. Composed professional expression.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

Pose and expression: Standing upright with one hand raised holding a marker, or both hands holding an open textbook. Warm, encouraging expression.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "日本人" (Japanese person) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult person in plain, neutral everyday clothes, standing in a natural relaxed upright posture. The PERSON is the single main subject and fills 70-80% of the frame — face, full body and posture clearly and completely rendered. As a SMALL secondary accent only, a tiny national flag pin or small fabric patch is worn on the chest or lapel: white background with a solid red circle (hinomaru) centered on it. This flag pin is deliberately small — roughly coin-sized relative to the body, no more than about 4% of the image area. It is a subtle identifying detail, NOT the focus, NOT enlarged, NOT held in the hands, NOT printed across the clothing. Neutral, friendly, welcoming expression. No other props, no costume, no uniform.
The flag's shapes and colors may be shown on the small pin, but DO NOT render any written text, letters, numbers or characters of any script on the flag or anywhere in the image.
Pose and expression: standing relaxed and upright, arms loosely at the sides, a slight warm smile, the body oriented to the camera at the diagonal 3/4 angle described below.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the
subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees
to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view
simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, NO characters of ANY script (including Japanese kanji/kana), no captions, no symbols anywhere — at any position in the rendered output. The small flag pin may show shapes and colors only, never any writing.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a hospital at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a medium to large hospital building with a calm, clean exterior.
The building's identity must be readable from its architecture and the functional cues below ALONE. DO NOT place any signage wording on the building. Any sign panel, banner, board or window lettering that appears must be left completely BLANK — no Japanese kanji/kana, no Latin letters, no numbers, no characters of any script.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: a covered entrance canopy with a wheelchair ramp beside the main door
- User action cue: a medical staff member in scrubs near the entrance, one patient with a family member
- Surrounding anchor: an ambulance bay or emergency vehicle space at the side

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top one-third for typography.
Entrance and functional cues are clearly visible.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white or pale sky-blue background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for accent details.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, NO characters of ANY script (explicitly including Japanese kanji and kana), no signage wording, no captions, no symbols anywhere in the image — including on any panel, banner, board, window or facade. All sign panels must be rendered blank.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a cheerful Japanese elementary or junior high school building.
The building's identity must be readable from its architecture and the functional cues below ALONE. DO NOT place any signage wording on the building. Any sign panel, banner, board or window lettering that appears must be left completely BLANK — no Japanese kanji/kana, no Latin letters, no numbers, no characters of any script.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
